item.title: Small 11X7 L Shaped Kitchen Floor Plan
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: Small 11X7 Shaped Kitchen Floor Plan Kitchen Shape: L Shaped Flooring: Tile, Marble, Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 86 sq. ft. Voltage: 120 V Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Rolls: “The WarmlyYours TempZone™ 3.7-Watt Floor Heating Cable allows you to bring radiant warmth to any room. TempZone™ Floor Heating Cable (Twin) is ultra-low EMF by design. It features a twin conductor with a 15’ cold lead and is available in two voltage options and a range of lengths to meet the requirements of any installation.

item.title: Spacious L Shaped Kitchen with Island
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: Spacious L Shaped Kitchen with Island Kitchen Shape: L Shaped Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 215 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Roll: “Add radiant warmth to your tile and stone floors with WarmlyYours TempZone™ Flex Rolls. These 240 VAC floor heating rolls feature a 1/8” TempZone™ heating cable, affixed to a mesh fabric backing in a serpentine pattern to evenly distribute heat across the floor.

TempZone™ Floor Heating Cable (Twin) is ultra-low EMF by design. It features a twin conductor with a 15’ cold lead and is available in two voltage options and a range of lengths to meet the requirements of any installation.

These 240 VAC floor heating rolls feature a 1/8” TempZone™ heating cable, affixed to a mesh fabric backing in a serpentine pattern to evenly distribute heat across the floor.

item.title: U Shaped Kitchen Floor Plan with Dimensions
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: U Shaped Kitchen Floor Plan with Dimensions Kitchen Shape: U Shaped Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Existing Concrete Slab Insulation Surface: 227 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Tempzone Flex Rolls: “Hard flooring surfaces can be cold underfoot any time of year, but are especially so when the weather gets cooler. Who wouldn’t enjoy the comfort of a WarmlyYours radiant in-floor heating system in their home?

item.title: U Shaped Kitchen with Island
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: U Shaped Kitchen with Island Kitchen Shape: U Shaped Flooring: Tile, Marble, or Stone Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 195 sq. ft. item.title: U Shaped Lake House Kitchen Floor Plan Design
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: U Shaped Lake House Kitchen Floor Plan Design Kitchen Shape: U Shaped Flooring: Engineered Wood Subfloor: Existing Concrete Slab Insulation Surface: 208 sq. ft. Voltage: 120 V Installation Options: Environ Flex Rolls: “WarmlyYours Environ Flex Rolls are designed for use under carpet*, laminate and floating wood. The mats can be installed easily and quickly for large spaces. Environ Flex Rolls are flexible rolls that can be cut and turned at 90° or 180° to cover the total area intended to be heated.

item.title: U Layout Hardwood Flooring
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: U Layout Hardwood Flooring Kitchen Shape: U Shaped Flooring: Hardwood Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 374 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Environ Flex Rolls: “WarmlyYours Environ Flex Rolls are designed for use under carpet, laminate and floating wood. The heated mats can be installed easily and quickly for large spaces. Environ Flex Rolls are flexible floor heating rolls that can be cut and turned at 90° or 180° to cover the total area intended to be heated.

item.title: U Shaped Kitchen and Kitchenette
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: U Shaped Kitchen and Kitchenette Kitchen Shape: U Shaped Flooring: Hard Wood Subfloor: Wood Insulation Surface: 300 sq. ft. Voltage: 240 V Installation Options: Tempzone Cable with Strips: “WarmlyYours TempZone™ Floor Heating Cable (Twin) brings radiant warmth and comfort to any room. This free-form cable provides the ultimate in flexibility, making it easy to customize installation for rooms of any size and shape.
